_evidenceStatus: EXPECTED — Scenario C. India is unaffected by sub-monthly changes.
_why: India pay groups use paySchedule MONTHLY → periodsPerYear=12, so gross/cycle = annualCtc/12 and tax = annualTax/12 exactly as before.
India PF/ESI/PT schemes have no apportionmentMode MONTHLY_TOTAL with ppm>1 in the monthly path → the standard per-cycle branch runs (unchanged code).
fiscalYearStartMonth=4 (Apr–Mar) preserved via LegalEntity; resolveFiscalYear handles YYYY-MM unchanged.
workWeekPattern defaults to MON-FRI → identical working-day counts.
_action: Run an India MONTHLY run on the local QA tenant and diff netPay against a pre-change baseline run — expect byte-identical per-employee figures.
